query:
INSERT INTO team_tools (team, label, href, emoji, color, sortOrder) VALUES
('天理', '祝祭日振替確認表　天理チーム', 'https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/11itqjd_wWSYZzmqi9jmTffyrKJYPLFvB8UNKZzGSuGE/edit?gid=1915511920#gid=1915511920', '📅', 'text-teal-600', (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(t1.sortOrder), 0) + 1 FROM team_tools t1 WHERE t1.team = '天理')),
('郡山北部', '祝祭日振替確認表　郡山チーム', 'https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/12v9igucd8zvWFmaTg5QHred_99hGImlgiYBr_sJQhNQ/edit?gid=791576564#gid=791576564', '📅', 'text-violet-600', (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(t2.sortOrder), 0) + 1 FROM team_tools t2 WHERE t2.team = '郡山北部')),
('郡山南部', '祝祭日振替確認表　郡山チーム', 'https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/12v9igucd8zvWFmaTg5QHred_99hGImlgiYBr_sJQhNQ/edit?gid=791576564#gid=791576564', '📅', 'text-violet-600', (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(t3.sortOrder), 0) + 1 FROM team_tools t3 WHERE t3.team = '郡山南部')),
('身体', '（祝）　身体振替表', 'https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1QbHIsnFREPq-Zm-HOoMYbvP6plei1V_nmr46Fn1cqrA/edit?gid=257908876#gid=257908876', '📅', 'text-orange-600', (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(t4.sortOrder), 0) + 1 FROM team_tools t4 WHERE t4.team = '身体'));
